title: Modded Life
description: A modpack for both Minirounds and Series alike
body:
## Modded Life

This is a modpack made for a Life Series (1.21.11 versions) or a Miniround (1.20.1 versions)! 

<details>
<summary>Series Version</summary>

This is the 1.21.11 versions! This is currently in **BETA**
it contains mods such as Life Series Mod, Enchancement, Accents, CC: Tweaked and many more!

We recommend hosting Limited Life with 48 Hours starting time!

</details>


<details>
<summary>Miniround Version</summary>

This is the 1.20.1 version! This is no longer updated..
it has mods such as Life Series Mod, Amarite, Arsenal, Orbital Railgun Enhanced, and many more!

</details>
